task_description: Replace deprecated github.com/freddierice/go-losetup/v2 with an internal/loopdev package using golang.org/x/sys/unix ioctls directly. Uses TDD, KISS, and DRY principles. No new external dependencies added.

verification.summary: All tests pass with -race (including concurrent Detach test), static build succeeds, golangci-lint shows 0 issues, no references to freddierice remain. internal/loopdev at 64.7% coverage. Review v1 issues all fixed. Review v2 remaining issue (SetAutoclear TOCTOU) accepted as negligible for current usage.
